summary: Completed testing of BijnisBooks new features: Smart Scanner (PNG/PDF/DOCX uploads), POS Quick Actions with labels, Currency Converter widget, Receipt generation (Print/PDF), and Currency Settings tab. All backend APIs working (100% pass rate). Frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Smart Scanner PNG upload - API returns 200, AI processes image
Smart Scanner PDF upload - API returns 200, PDF converted to image for AI processing
Smart Scanner DOCX upload - API returns 200, text extracted and processed
Smart Scanner Excel upload - API returns 200, items parsed correctly
POS Quick Actions show icons WITH labels (Customers, Items, Vouchers, Purchases, Ledger)
Dashboard Quick Actions show icons WITH labels (POS, Items, Inventory, Customers, etc.)
Currency Converter widget visible in POS cart when items added
Currency Settings tab in Settings page with Base/Display currency dropdowns
Currency Settings shows exchange rate preview for multiple currencies
Recent sales API returns invoice data for receipts
Receipt modal has Print, PDF, WhatsApp buttons after sale completion
critical_code_review_comments: Smart Scanner properly handles multiple file formats (PNG, PDF, DOCX, Excel)
Currency Converter uses static exchange rates - consider adding live rate API integration in future
Receipt Print/PDF functionality uses browser's native print dialog and html2canvas for PDF generation
seed_data_creation: Created test files in /app/test_files/ for Smart Scanner testing (test_inventory.png, test_invoice.pdf, test_inventory.docx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Smart Scanner supports PNG/PDF/DOCX/Excel uploads with AI-powered extraction, 2) POS Quick Actions show icons WITH labels, 3) Currency Converter widget appears in POS cart when items are added, 4) Receipt modal shows Print/PDF/WhatsApp buttons after completing a sale, 5) Settings page has Currency tab with Base/Display currency settings. poppler-utils was installed for PDF processing.

smart_scanner.png_upload: YES - API returns 200, AI processes image
smart_scanner.pdf_upload: YES - API returns 200, PDF converted to image
smart_scanner.ui_page: YES - Smart Stock Scanner page with Excel/CSV Upload, Invoice Scanner, Camera Scan tabs
smart_scanner.document_types: YES - Auto Detect, Invoice/Receipt, Handwritten, Inventory List

pos_quick_actions.icons_with_labels: YES - Customers, Items, Vouchers, Purchases, Ledger all show icons AND text labels
pos_quick_actions.dashboard_quick_actions: YES - POS, Items, Inventory, Customers, Purchases, Transfers, Vouchers, Ledger, Discounts, Suppliers, Stores, Employees

currency_converter.widget_in_pos: YES - 'Show in other currency' button visible when cart has items
currency_converter.currency_dropdown: YES - Can select USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, JPY, CNY, SGD, AUD, CAD, MYR, THB, NPR, BDT, PKR, LKR
currency_converter.equivalent_display: YES - Shows converted amount in selected currency

receipt_generation.whatsapp_button: YES - Opens WhatsApp with receipt text

currency_settings.settings_tab: YES - Currency tab in Settings page
currency_settings.base_currency: YES - Dropdown to select base currency for storing prices
currency_settings.display_currency: YES - Dropdown to select display currency
currency_settings.preview: YES - Shows sample prices in selected currency
currency_settings.exchange_rates: YES - Shows current exchange rates for all supported currencies
